merits.label: Bond Resistance
merits.description: Easier to resist the Blood Bond; each dot reduces Defiance check difficulty by one.

merits.label: Short Bond
merits.description: Bond decays faster: reduce Bond Strength by two each month without feeding from your regnant (still need one successful Defiance check that month).

merits.label: Sympathy Pains
merits.description: Whenever any of your thralls take Aggravated Damage, you feel a twinge signaling they are in danger.

merits.label: Unbondable
merits.description: Cannot be Blood Bound. Must be purchased at character creation.

merits.label: Linguistics
merits.description: Each dot grants two extra languages you may speak and/or write beyond your native tongue and the game's local common language.

merits.label: Cobbler
merits.description: Can create and improve Masks for yourself and others using downtime actions. Prerequisite: Mask (••).

merits.label: Phenom
merits.description: Extremely talented performer, academic, or craftsperson. Choose Academics, Crafts, or Performance; gain an extra specialty per dot in that Skill. May purchase once per listed Skill.

merits.label: Zeroed
merits.description: No fingerprints, DNA, or facial recognition on file; name searches come up empty. Cannot take both Zeroed and Known Blankbody. Prerequisite: Mask (•••).

merits.label: Bloodhound
merits.description: Identify a mortal's Blood Resonance within five steps (simple action, then Resolve + Awareness vs. 3). Ghouls may purchase.

merits.label: Iron Gullet
merits.description: Can feed from stale, bagged, or long-dead blood. Ventrue and Blood Potency 3+ cannot benefit.

merits.label: Viscosity
merits.description: Blood does not dilute after tapping a Dyscrasia; each dot allows one additional Dyscrasia tap per session (still only one Dyscrasia at a time).

merits.label: Blood Empathy
merits.description: Stronger bond to your regnant: sense their emotional state while in their presence; feel a twinge when they take aggravated damage.

merits.label: Vampiric Visage
merits.description: Aura reads vampiric; heartbeat hard to detect, teeth appear fang-like, breath nearly undetectable.

merits.label: Loremaster
merits.description: Encyclopedic supernatural knowledge; +2 bonus to all Lore checks.

merits.label: Medium
merits.description: Channel to the Shadowlands: sense and hear ghosts within 15 steps; ghosts may become visible to you alone without spending Pathos.

merits.label: Ambidextrous
merits.description: Use both hands with equal dexterity; dual-wield benefits, staggered firearm reload, disarm targets only one held weapon.

merits.label: Eat Food
merits.description: May consume food and drink (not blood) regardless of Humanity; provides no nourishment and must be expelled before resting.

merits.label: Light Sleeper
merits.description: Automatically wake in dangerous situations; may stay awake 30 minutes free, then spend Willpower for up to one more hour.

merits.label: Calm Heart
merits.description: Great emotional control; reduce all Frenzy trigger difficulty by two (Brujah gain no benefit vs. Fury Frenzy).

merits.label: Common Sense
merits.description: Twice per game, ask the Storyteller one risk-assessment question about the current situation and receive a truthful answer.

merits.label: Anarch Comrades
merits.description: Local Anarch vampires will exchange major and life boons with you; without it, non-thin-blood Anarchs may refuse major/life boons.

merits.label: Camarilla Contact
merits.description: A friendly Camarilla vampire holds minor/trivial boons for you and keeps your thin-blood nature secret.

merits.label: Catenating Blood
merits.description: Blood strong enough to Blood Bond, create ghouls, and Embrace (embraced child is also thin-blood).

merits.label: Day Drinker
merits.description: No sunlight damage; instead halve health boxes while exposed, cannot use Disciplines/Alchemy in sun, and lose Willpower if awake more than two days.

merits.label: Discipline Affinity
merits.description: Affinity for one Discipline: gain one free dot and may buy more at out-of-clinic costs in addition to resonance-fed Discipline.

merits.label: Lifelike
merits.description: Biologically identical to a mortal at all times; mundane and supernatural scrutiny (except sun damage) reads human.

merits.label: Thin-Blood Alchemist
merits.description: Know Thin-Blood Alchemy: first dot and one Formula free; buy more dots and Formulae with XP.

merits.label: Vampiric Resilience
merits.description: Take damage and heal like a full vampire rather than a mortal.

flaws.label: Bond at First Taste
flaws.description: Bond at the first drink of vampire blood; thrall after one drink with Bond Strength starting at one.

flaws.label: Bond Junkie
flaws.description: The Bond feels sweeter; increase Defiance check difficulty by this Flaw's dot rating.

flaws.label: Long Bond
flaws.description: Bond decays slowly: reduce Bond Strength by one every three months without feeding from regnant.

flaws.label: Symbiotic Dependency
flaws.description: Physical link to regnant: for every two damage they take, you take one of the same type anywhere; their Final Death kills you within minutes.

flaws.label: Enemy
flaws.description: Someone in a Sphere of Influence actively works against you (harassment to murder by dot level). May be taken multiple times for different enemies.

flaws.label: Infamy
flaws.description: Famous for something horrible in a chosen Sphere; cumulative -2 to mundane non-Intimidation social interactions with those who recognize you per dot.

flaws.label: Poor
flaws.description: Worse off than lower-middle class; cannot buy Resources. Limits Haven dots/advantages by level; at three dots you may not buy Haven (but can use others' Havens without advantages).

flaws.label: No Haven
flaws.description: No consistent daytime rest; must find shelter each dawn, one fewer downtime action, cannot buy or benefit from Haven.

flaws.label: Obvious Predator
flaws.description: Look frighteningly predatory; cannot buy Herd and take -1 to non-violent feeding challenges.

flaws.label: Illiterate
flaws.description: Cannot read or write; can match familiar sign letters but not compose text.

flaws.label: Known Corpse
flaws.description: Mortals know you died; friends and family react with horror. Prerequisite: no Mask dots.

flaws.label: Known Blankbody
flaws.description: Flagged in government databases; monthly downtime to cover tracks or face Hunters. Failed hunts draw Hunter attention. Cannot take Zeroed. Prerequisite: no Mask dots.

flaws.label: Farmer
flaws.description: Feed exclusively from animals; must spend two Willpower to feed from any other source. Blood Potency 3+ may not take.

flaws.label: Methuselah´s Thirst
flaws.description: Hunger only fully Slaked by draining a supernatural creature dry (killing it unless it can survive).

flaws.label: Organovore
flaws.description: Slake Hunger only from live human flesh/organs (major organs, ≤30 minutes dead); must kill and consume most organs/flesh to drop Hunger below 1.

flaws.label: Prey Exclusion
flaws.description: Refuse to feed from a chosen class of mortals; doing so gains Stains as a Tenet violation. Ventrue gain an extra vessel restriction.

flaws.label: Weak Stomach
flaws.description: Squeamish around blood; Weakened for one hour after feeding and start each session Weakened. Ghouls may purchase.

flaws.label: Baneful Blood
flaws.description: Your regnant's clan Bane transferred to you at Bane Severity equal to this Flaw's dots; persists even if regnant changes.

flaws.label: Crone´s Curse
flaws.description: Ghouling aged you unnaturally: appear ten years older and have one fewer health box.

flaws.label: Distressing Fangs
flaws.description: Teeth mystically sharpen overnight; off-putting to humans and probable cause for Inquisition stops.

flaws.label: Bound to the Earth
flaws.description: Must rest near natural soil or do not regain Willpower upon Awakening.

flaws.label: Eerie Presence
flaws.description: Radiate unsettling otherworldliness (visual, scent, or tactile); always disconcerting, may breach Masquerade.

flaws.label: Folkloric Bane
flaws.description: Besides sun and fire, a common substance (e.g. silver, cold iron, holy water) deals Aggravated Damage; touching it causes one aggravated.

flaws.label: Folkloric Block
flaws.description: Cannot willingly come within five steps of a chosen folkloric object/place (holy symbols, running water, invitation-only entries, etc.) or gain Frightened until you leave.

flaws.label: Haunted
flaws.description: A ghostly enemy harasses you like the Enemy Background, built by the Storyteller.

flaws.label: Stake Bait
flaws.description: Heart remains mortal; successful staking causes Final Death.

flaws.label: Stigmata
flaws.description: At Hunger 4+, bleed from hands, feet, and forehead (attracts attention, no extra Hunger).

flaws.label: Trouble Magnet
flaws.description: Storyteller random bad luck always targets you when multiple outcomes are possible.

flaws.label: Awkward Mobility
flaws.description: Move slowly; two steps per movement action instead of three.

flaws.label: Deep Sleeper
flaws.description: Cannot spend Willpower to stay awake at sunrise unless danger; Awakening costs an extra Willpower.

flaws.label: Low Pain Threshold
flaws.description: Wound penalties start one box earlier per dot (max dots = total health boxes − 3).

flaws.label: Slow Healing
flaws.description: Combat Rouse-to-mend resolves at end of round after the mass Rouse challenge.

flaws.label: Archaic
flaws.description: Modern technology enrages you; cannot buy Driving, modern Science, or Technology and cannot use machinery from the last 100 years. 9th Gen+, 100+ years Embraced only.

flaws.label: Dark Secret
flaws.description: A secret that would cause great embarrassment if revealed; must buy off if public. Only one Dark Secret.

flaws.label: Death Sight
flaws.description: World appears decaying and dead; cannot determine creature type or mood even with powers like Scry the Soul.

flaws.label: Living on the Edge
flaws.description: Curiosity overrides caution; lose Willpower when you pass up new experiences, Impaired if you run out.

flaws.label: Impatient
flaws.description: Must spend Willpower to wait five minutes when forced to be patient; otherwise lash out in anger.

flaws.label: Weak Willed
flaws.description: Cannot resolve Distracted, Disoriented, Staggered, or Prone without another character's help; immune to powers that alter those Conditions.

flaws.label: Baby Teeth
flaws.description: Never developed fangs; must cut victims or use a syringe—no Sip unless target is unconscious.

flaws.label: Bestial Temper
flaws.description: Beast as strong as a full vampire; test for Terror and Rage Frenzy like a full-blood.

flaws.label: Branded by the Camarilla
flaws.description: Pay trivial boons to be tolerated on Camarilla turf; name known as branded and extortion-prone.

flaws.label: Clan Curse
flaws.description: Suffer your sire's clan Bane at Severity 1 (Brujah/Gangrel if Bestial Temper; Tremere if Catenating Blood).

flaws.label: Dead Flesh
flaws.description: Rotting, green-tinted flesh and stench; Masquerade breach without Obfuscate. Cannot take Lifelike.

flaws.label: Mortal Frailty
flaws.description: Heal as a mortal; cannot Rouse the Blood to mend. Cannot take Vampiric Resilience.

flaws.label: Shunned by the Anarchs
flaws.description: Anarchs refuse all boons with you and may send Enforcers; cannot take Anarch Comrades.

flaws.label: Vitae Dependency
flaws.description: Must Slake at least one Hunger from vampire blood weekly or lose Disciplines and Thin-Blood Alchemy.
